HGSS.126.0000:
Hold it.\f
...Are you going to challenge the
Pokémon League?\f
Victory Road is at its end, for sure.\f
But did you notice...?
You didn’t see any real Trainers on the\r
way, did you?\f
Man, they were all spineless!\f
Well, the fact that you have come this
far means you’re not one of them.\f
But!\f
Your journey ends here!\f
Because...right here, right now...
I will crush you!\f
HGSS.126.0001:
..................\f
I haven’t given up on becoming the
greatest Trainer...\f
I’m going to find out why I can’t win and
become stronger...\f
When I do, I will challenge you.\f
I’ll beat you down with all my power.
...Humph! You keep at it until then.\f
